name: agentic-onboarding
description: Bitrise prospect onboarding skills, served from the bitrise-io/agentic-onboarding repo

plugins.name: bitrise-agentic-onboarding
plugins.description: Walks a Bitrise prospect from no account to a public install page using the agentic-onboarding branch of the Bitrise MCP. One skill per stage (signup, CI first build, Release Management) plus an orchestrator.
